content: func walkBreadth(root *Node) { queue := []*Node{root}; for len(queue) > 0 { n := queue[0]; queue = queue[1:]; for _, c := range n.children { queue = append(queue, c) } } }
func walkDepth(root *Node) { for _, c := range root.children { walkDepth(c) } }
func buildGraph(rs []Edge) *Node { roots := map[string]*Node{}; for _, e := range rs { connect(roots, e.From, e.To) }; return rootOf(roots) }
func detectCycle(g *Graph) bool { visited := map[*Node]int{}; for _, n := range g.nodes { if dfsCycle(n, visited) { return true } }; return false }
func pageRank(g *Graph, damping float64, iters int) map[*Node]float64 { scores := initScores(g); for i := 0; i < iters; i++ { scores = iterate(g, scores, damping) }; return scores }
func validateToken(tok string) (Claims, error) { parts := strings.Split(tok, "."); if len(parts) != 3 { return Claims{}, ErrMalformed }; return decodeClaims(parts[1]) }
func newSession(uid string) *Session { id := randomID(); s := &Session{ID: id, UserID: uid, Created: time.Now()}; sessionStore.Put(s); return s }
func hashPassword(pw string) ([]byte, error) { salt := randomSalt(); return bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword(append(salt, []byte(pw)...), bcrypt.DefaultCost) }
func refreshToken(old string) (string, error) { c, err := validateToken(old); if err != nil { return "", err }; return issueToken(c.Subject) }
func (c *LRU) Get(k string) (any, bool) { e, ok := c.m[k]; if !ok { return nil, false }; c.list.MoveToFront(e); return e.Value, true }
func (c *TTLCache) Get(k string) (any, bool) { e, ok := c.m[k]; if !ok || time.Now().After(e.Expires) { return nil, false }; return e.Value, true }
func (s *Sharded) Get(k string) (any, bool) { shard := s.shards[hash(k)%uint32(len(s.shards))]; shard.mu.RLock(); defer shard.mu.RUnlock(); return shard.m[k], shard.m[k] != nil }
func openDB(path string) (*sql.DB, error) { return sql.Open("sqlite3", "file:"+path+"?_journal_mode=WAL") }
func migrate(db *sql.DB) error { for _, stmt := range schema { if _, err := db.Exec(stmt); err != nil { return err } }; return nil }
func searchFTS(db *sql.DB, q string, k int) ([]Hit, error) { rows, err := db.Query("SELECT rowid FROM chunks_fts WHERE chunks_fts MATCH ? ORDER BY bm25(chunks_fts) LIMIT ?", q, k); ... }
func (c *Client) Embed(ctx context.Context, in []string) ([][]float32, error) { req := EmbedRequest{Model: c.model, Input: in}; return c.do(ctx, req) }

func batchEmbed(c Client, texts []string, size int) ([][]float32, error) { var out [][]float32; for i := 0; i < len(texts); i += size { v, _ := c.Embed(ctx, texts[i:min(i+size, len(texts))]); out = append(out, v...) }; return out, nil }
func (c *CrossEncoder) Rerank(q string, docs []string) ([]Score, error) { pairs := make([][2]string, len(docs)); for i, d := range docs { pairs[i] = [2]string{q, d} }; return c.score(pairs) }
func (l *LRU) Get(key string) (cached, bool) { l.mu.Lock(); defer l.mu.Unlock(); e, ok := l.m[key]; if ok { l.touch(e) }; return e.val, ok }
func (d *Debouncer) Fire(p string) { d.mu.Lock(); defer d.mu.Unlock(); if t, ok := d.timers[p]; ok { t.Stop() }; d.timers[p] = time.AfterFunc(d.delay, func() { d.cb(p) }) }
func walkTree(root string, cb func(string)) error { return filepath.Walk(root, func(p string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error { if !info.IsDir() { cb(p) }; return nil }) }
func loadIgnore(root string) (*Matcher, error) { data, err := os.ReadFile(filepath.Join(root, ".gitignore")); if err != nil { return emptyMatcher, nil }; return parseGitignore(data) }
func RunStdio(ctx context.Context, h Handlers) error { srv := newServer(h); return srv.serve(ctx, os.Stdin, os.Stdout) }
func (s *Server) ask(ctx context.Context, in AskInput) (AskOutput, error) { hits, _ := s.store.Search(ctx, vec(in.Question), in.Question, in.K); return AskOutput{Hits: hits}, nil }
func chunkFile(path string, src []byte) ([]Chunk, error) { tree, err := parser.Parse(src); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return splitByDeclarations(tree, src), nil }
